title: Google Trends Autocomplete Scraper
description: Get Google Trends autocomplete suggestions for one seed keyword.

query.title: Search Query
query.description: Partial keyword or phrase to expand with Google Trends autocomplete suggestions.

q.title: Search Query Alias
q.description: Alias for query when reusing direct Scrappa API inputs. Either Search Query or this alias is required.

geo.title: Location
geo.description: Geographic location code, such as US, GB, DE, or Worldwide.

hl.title: Language
hl.description: Two-letter language code, such as en, de, es, or fr.
